assertion_results.text: Bug parsing correctly extracts all four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) using the heading formats from bug-template-mock.md (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: In bug-parsing.md, the Bug Template Sections table (lines 35-41) lists all four required sections with heading formats matching bug-template-mock.md exactly: `### **Issue Description**`, `### **Steps to Reproduce**`, `### **Expected Result**`, `### **Actual Result**`, all marked 'Yes'. Parsed content for each section is present in lines 54-79 under the Parsed Description Sections heading.

assertion_results.text: Bug validation confirms the issue type ID (10020) matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: In bug-parsing.md, lines 15-17: 'Issue type from ACME-500: Bug (ID: 10020)' and 'Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration: 10020' with 'Result: MATCH -- issue type is confirmed as Bug.'

assertion_results.text: Investigation identifies the trailing-whitespace heading extraction as the root cause — line[3:] does not strip whitespace (Steps 2-3)
assertion_results.evidence: In investigation.md, lines 23-29: 'The extraction `line[3:]` takes everything after the `## ` prefix but does **not** strip trailing whitespace. When a heading line has trailing spaces (e.g., `## Migration Patterns  \n`), the extracted key becomes `"Migration Patterns  "` (with trailing spaces).' Line 44: 'The behavior diverges at the `line[3:]` extraction -- the heading text retains trailing whitespace, causing the downstream exact-match lookup to fail.' Line 88: 'Single root cause: The bug has a single root cause (missing `.strip()` on heading extraction).'

assertion_results.text: Root cause comment includes: what is broken (heading extraction does not strip trailing whitespace), where it is broken (plan-feature convention lookup), and how to verify the fix (reproducer test with whitespace in heading) (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: In root-cause.md: WHAT is broken (lines 9-11): 'convention extraction logic uses `line[3:]` to extract heading text from `CONVENTIONS.md`, but does not strip trailing whitespace'. WHERE it is broken (lines 19-20): 'plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md -- convention extraction loop (`section_name = line[3:]`) lacks `.strip()` call'. HOW to verify (lines 33-39): reproducer strategy with test fixture with trailing whitespace, running extraction, and asserting extracted name equals 'Migration Patterns' without trailing spaces.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST acceptance criterion — before any fix criteria (Step 5 Acceptance Criteria ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: In task-description.md, line 66, the first acceptance criterion is: '- [ ] A reproducer test demonstrates the bug: extraction of a heading with trailing whitespace from CONVENTIONS.md yields a key that matches the expected convention name (fails before fix, passes after)'. The fix criterion ('line[3:] is replaced with line[3:].strip()') follows on line 67.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST test requirement — with explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (Step 5 Test Requirements ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: In task-description.md, line 71, the first test requirement is: '- [ ] Reproducer test: create a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on at least one heading (e.g., `## Migration Patterns  `), run the convention extraction logic, and assert that (a) the extracted section name equals `"Migration Patterns"` without trailing spaces, and (b) the convention-aware task enrichment includes the convention in the generated task\'s Implementation Notes'. This includes explicit assertion guidance (assert section name equality, assert convention inclusion) derived from the Steps to Reproduce.

assertion_results.text: Task description includes a Bug Context section with Bug key (ACME-500), Steps to Reproduce, Expected/Actual Result, and Root Cause summary (Step 5 Bug Context extension)
assertion_results.evidence: In task-description.md, lines 78-84: '## Bug Context' section containing: Bug key '[ACME-500](https://mock-jira.example.com/browse/ACME-500)', Steps to Reproduce ('Create a CONVENTIONS.md with trailing whitespace on a heading...'), Expected Result ('should include the convention reference...'), Actual Result ('do NOT reference the Migration Patterns convention...'), and Root Cause summary ('convention extraction logic uses `line[3:]`... does not call `.strip()`...').

assertion_results.text: Task description sets Target Branch to main (Step 5 Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: In task-description.md, lines 13-14: '## Target Branch' followed by 'main'.

assertion_results.text: Task description output includes ai-generated-jira in the Jira API metadata block showing it would be passed as a label to jira.create_issue (Step 5 Task creation)
assertion_results.evidence:
In task-description.md, lines 1-7: '<!-- Jira API Metadata Block
jira.create_issue parameters:
  project_key: ACME
  issue_type: Task
  labels:
    - ai-generated-jira
-->'. The label 'ai-generated-jira' is present in the labels list under jira.create_issue parameters.
